_comment: Per-JVD platform-pill overrides applied by reconcile-platforms.mjs AFTER the API+README+config union. 'exclude' removes confirmed-wrong entries (e.g. API mis-attribution of a sibling JVD's gear); 'add' force-adds a model the sources miss. Keep this list minimal and evidence-based.

3stage_dc._note: Base 3-Stage DC fabric has no firewall/MX; SRX4600+MX304 belong to the Connected Security variant (API mis-attribution).
